tools.name: codemesh_answer
tools.description: One-call context assembly. USE THIS FIRST for any code question.

tools.name: codemesh_enrich
tools.description: Add an AI-generated concept linked to a file or symbol.

tools.name: codemesh_workflow
tools.description: Create a workflow that links files in a logical sequence.

tools.name: codemesh_status
tools.description: Get statistics about the knowledge graph.

tools.name: codemesh_trace
tools.description: Trace a call chain from a symbol to its leaf nodes.

tools.name: codemesh_map
tools.description: Map the call graph from a query or symbol.

tools.name: codemesh_source
tools.description: Get the source code of a specific symbol by its ID.
